title: Replace footer social icon with WhatsApp logo and link

requirements.text: In the Footer component, replace the third social media link's SVG icon (located at XPath /html[1]/body[1]/div[1]/div[1]/main[1]/footer[1]/div[3]/div[1]/div[1]/div[2]/a[3]/svg[1]) with the WhatsApp SVG logo, and update its href to https://whatsapp.com/channel/0029Vb8BEFtFXUuarLwqVs0C. The link must open in a new tab with rel='noopener noreferrer'. The WhatsApp icon should match the same size and styling (hover effects, color) as the other social icons in the footer.

quotes: Is ki jagha Whatsapp Ka logo daal do Mera Matlab change kardo or us me ye link Bhi daal do :https://whatsapp.com/channel/0029Vb8BEFtFXUuarLwqVs0C

acceptanceCriteria: The third social icon in the footer is now the WhatsApp logo (recognizable green telephone-in-bubble icon using standard WhatsApp SVG path).
Clicking the icon opens https://whatsapp.com/channel/0029Vb8BEFtFXUuarLwqVs0C in a new browser tab.
The icon size and hover styling are consistent with the other social media icons in the same row.
No other footer icons or links are changed.

constraints: Only the third social link icon and its href in the footer must be changed; all other social links remain untouched.
Do not modify any immutable frontend paths.
nonGoals: Changing any other section of the site.
Adding WhatsApp links anywhere other than the footer social icon row.
